page_title: Evangelion no Yuru~i Nakama Yurushito desu
text:
is a full color artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 23 December 2021 for the tenth anniversary of Yurushito.

Overview

All the Yurushito friends are here!
Character Introduction
A relaxed look back at the past 10 years in "Yurushito's Journey"
A new "4-Panel Comic" themed around the four seasons
A carefully selected collection of tweets from the irregular series over the years! "Yurushito Today"
Yurushito conquers all 47 prefectures! "A Relaxed Journey Across Japan"

Table of Contents

Staff

Editions

ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4909466099
